title: Headroom: The Netflix Tool That Makes AI Agents 10x Cheaper
summary: Headroom is an open-source tool that compresses AI agent inputs including tool outputs, code files, and RAG results before reaching the LLM, reducing token usage by 60-95%. It uses content-type-aware compressors and a locally trained Kompress-based model, eliminating compression overhead. The tool includes a breadcrumb hash mechanism for on-demand retrieval of full original content when needed.
